name: sapb1_sql_users_list (Business Partners - Customers)
body_template:
{
  "dbName": "{dbName}",
  "db": {
    "server": "{server}",
    "database": "{dbName}",
    "user": "{user}",
    "password": "<REDACTED>"
  },
  "query": "DECLARE @searchLike NVARCHAR(200) = CASE WHEN @search IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(@search)) = '' THEN NULL ELSE CONCAT('%', @search, '%') END;

SELECT
  COUNT(1) OVER() AS TotalRows,
  c.CardCode, c.CardName, c.CardType, c.GroupCode, g.GroupName,
  c.Phone1, c.Phone2, c.Cellular, c.E_Mail,
  c.Balance, c.CreditLine, c.DebPayAcct,
  c.SlpCode, s.SlpName,
  c.GroupNum, t.PymntGroup
FROM OCRD c
LEFT JOIN OCRG g ON g.GroupCode = c.GroupCode
LEFT JOIN OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = c.SlpCode
LEFT JOIN OCTG t ON t.GroupNum = c.GroupNum
WHERE
  c.CardType = 'C'
  AND (
    @searchLike IS NULL
    OR c.CardCode LIKE @searchLike
    OR c.CardName LIKE @searchLike
    OR c.Phone1 LIKE @searchLike
    OR c.E_Mail LIKE @searchLike
  )
ORDER BY c.CardName ASC
OFFSET (CASE WHEN @page IS NULL OR @page < 1 THEN 0 ELSE (@page - 1) * @pageSize END) ROWS
FETCH NEXT @pageSize ROWS ONLY;",
  "params": {
    "search": "{search}",
    "page": {page},
    "pageSize": {pageSize}
  }
}

name: sapb1_sql_user_bundle (Customer details + addresses + contacts)
body_template:
{
  "dbName": "{dbName}",
  "db": {
    "server": "{server}",
    "database": "{dbName}",
    "user": "{user}",
    "password": "<REDACTED>"
  },
  "query": "-- Recordset #1: customer master
SELECT
  c.CardCode, c.CardName, c.CardType, c.GroupCode, g.GroupName,
  c.Phone1, c.Phone2, c.Cellular, c.E_Mail,
  c.LicTradNum AS TaxId, c.VatStatus,
  c.Balance, c.CreditLine,
  c.GroupNum, t.PymntGroup,
  c.SlpCode, s.SlpName,
  c.Currency, c.DebPayAcct
FROM OCRD c
LEFT JOIN OCRG g ON g.GroupCode = c.GroupCode
LEFT JOIN OSLP s ON s.SlpCode = c.SlpCode
LEFT JOIN OCTG t ON t.GroupNum = c.GroupNum
WHERE c.CardCode = @cardCode;

-- Recordset #2: addresses
SELECT *
FROM CRD1
WHERE CardCode = @cardCode
ORDER BY Address ASC;

-- Recordset #3: contacts
SELECT *
FROM OCPR
WHERE CardCode = @cardCode
ORDER BY Name ASC;",
  "params": {
    "cardCode": "{cardCode}"
  }
}

name: sapb1_sql_products_list (Items + group + paging + total)
body_template:
{
  "dbName": "{dbName}",
  "db": {
    "server": "{server}",
    "database": "{dbName}",
    "user": "{user}",
    "password": "<REDACTED>"
  },
  "query": "DECLARE @searchLike NVARCHAR(200) = CASE WHEN @search IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(@search)) = '' THEN NULL ELSE CONCAT('%', @search, '%') END;

SELECT
  COUNT(1) OVER() AS TotalRows,
  i.ItemCode, i.ItemName, i.ForeignName,
  i.ItmsGrpCod, g.ItmsGrpNam,
  i.SellItem, i.PrchseItem, i.InvntItem,
  i.VatGourpSa, i.VatGroupPu,
  i.UoMGroupEntry, i.SalUnitMsr, i.BuyUnitMsr
FROM OITM i
LEFT JOIN OITB g ON g.ItmsGrpCod = i.ItmsGrpCod
WHERE
  (@itmsGrpCod IS NULL OR i.ItmsGrpCod = @itmsGrpCod)
  AND (@searchLike IS NULL OR i.ItemCode LIKE @searchLike OR i.ItemName LIKE @searchLike OR i.ForeignName LIKE @searchLike)
ORDER BY i.ItemCode ASC
OFFSET (CASE WHEN @page IS NULL OR @page < 1 THEN 0 ELSE (@page - 1) * @pageSize END) ROWS
FETCH NEXT @pageSize ROWS ONLY;

-- Recordset #2: item groups
SELECT ItmsGrpCod, ItmsGrpNam FROM OITB ORDER BY ItmsGrpNam ASC;

-- Recordset #3: price lists
SELECT ListNum, ListName, Currency FROM OPLN ORDER BY ListNum ASC;",
  "params": {
    "search": "{search}",
    "itmsGrpCod": {itmsGrpCod},
    "page": {page},
    "pageSize": {pageSize}
  }
}

name: sapb1_sql_prices_by_skus (Item prices from price list)
sapb1_sql_stocks_by_skus (Stock by warehouse)
sapb1_sql_documents_list_sales_orders (ORDR)
body_template:
{
  "dbName": "{dbName}",
  "db": {
    "server": "{server}",
    "database": "{dbName}",
    "user": "{user}",
    "password": "<REDACTED>"
  },
  "query": "DECLARE @searchLike NVARCHAR(200) = CASE WHEN @search IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(@search)) = '' THEN NULL ELSE CONCAT('%', @search, '%') END;

SELECT
  COUNT(1) OVER() AS TotalRows,
  o.DocEntry, o.DocNum, o.DocDate, o.DocDueDate,
  o.CardCode, o.CardName, o.DocStatus, o.CANCELED,
  o.DocTotal, o.VatSum, o.Comments
FROM ORDR o
WHERE
  o.DocDate >= TRY_CONVERT(date, @dateFrom)
  AND o.DocDate <= TRY_CONVERT(date, @dateTo)
  AND (@cardCode IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(@cardCode)) = '' OR o.CardCode = @cardCode)
  AND (@slpCode IS NULL OR o.SlpCode = @slpCode)
  AND (
    @searchLike IS NULL
    OR CAST(o.DocNum AS nvarchar(50)) LIKE @searchLike
    OR o.CardCode LIKE @searchLike
    OR o.CardName LIKE @searchLike
  )
ORDER BY o.DocDate DESC, o.DocEntry DESC
OFFSET (CASE WHEN @page IS NULL OR @page < 1 THEN 0 ELSE (@page - 1) * @pageSize END) ROWS
FETCH NEXT @pageSize ROWS ONLY;",
  "params": {
    "dateFrom": "{dateFrom}",
    "dateTo": "{dateTo}",
    "cardCode": "{cardCode}",
    "slpCode": {slpCode},
    "search": "{search}",
    "page": {page},
    "pageSize": {pageSize}
  }
}

name: sapb1_sql_document_items_sales_order (ORDR + RDR1)
sapb1_sql_documents_list_ar_invoices (OINV)
body_template:
{
  "dbName": "{dbName}",
  "db": {
    "server": "{server}",
    "database": "{dbName}",
    "user": "{user}",
    "password": "<REDACTED>"
  },
  "query": "DECLARE @searchLike NVARCHAR(200) = CASE WHEN @search IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(@search)) = '' THEN NULL ELSE CONCAT('%', @search, '%') END;

SELECT
  COUNT(1) OVER() AS TotalRows,
  i.DocEntry, i.DocNum, i.DocDate, i.DocDueDate,
  i.CardCode, i.CardName, i.DocStatus, i.CANCELED,
  i.DocTotal, i.PaidToDate, (i.DocTotal - i.PaidToDate) AS OpenAmount
FROM OINV i
WHERE
  i.DocDate >= TRY_CONVERT(date, @dateFrom)
  AND i.DocDate <= TRY_CONVERT(date, @dateTo)
  AND (@cardCode IS NULL OR LTRIM(RTRIM(@cardCode)) = '' OR i.CardCode = @cardCode)
  AND (
    @searchLike IS NULL
    OR CAST(i.DocNum AS nvarchar(50)) LIKE @searchLike
    OR i.CardCode LIKE @searchLike
    OR i.CardName LIKE @searchLike
  )
ORDER BY i.DocDate DESC, i.DocEntry DESC
OFFSET (CASE WHEN @page IS NULL OR @page < 1 THEN 0 ELSE (@page - 1) * @pageSize END) ROWS
FETCH NEXT @pageSize ROWS ONLY;",
  "params": {
    "dateFrom": "{dateFrom}",
    "dateTo": "{dateTo}",
    "cardCode": "{cardCode}",
    "search": "{search}",
    "page": {page},
    "pageSize": {pageSize}
  }
}

name: sapb1_sql_document_items_ar_invoice (OINV + INV1)
sapb1_sql_purchase_history_customer_sku (Customer bought this SKU - last 6 months)
sapb1_sql_purchase_delivery_by_sku (Open purchase orders for SKU)
sapb1_sql_agents (Sales employees)
sapb1_sql_agent_profile_bundle (Monthly totals + totals today/month)
body_template:
{
  "dbName": "{dbName}",
  "db": {
    "server": "{server}",
    "database": "{dbName}",
    "user": "{user}",
    "password": "<REDACTED>"
  },
  "query": "DECLARE @startOfToday DATE = CAST(GETDATE() AS date);
DECLARE @startOfMonth DATE = DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(GETDATE()), MONTH(GETDATE()), 1);

-- Recordset #1: monthlyTotals (invoices)
SELECT
  SUM(DocTotal) AS total,
  MONTH(DocDate) AS [month],
  YEAR(DocDate) AS [year]
FROM OINV
WHERE
  SlpCode = @slpCode
  AND CANCELED = 'N'
  AND DocDate BETWEEN TRY_CONVERT(date, @dateFrom) AND TRY_CONVERT(date, @dateTo)
GROUP BY YEAR(DocDate), MONTH(DocDate)
ORDER BY YEAR(DocDate), MONTH(DocDate);

-- Recordset #2: totalsChosenPeriod
SELECT
  SUM(DocTotal) AS total,
  COUNT(*) AS totalDocs,
  AVG(DocTotal) AS averageBasket
FROM OINV
WHERE
  SlpCode = @slpCode
  AND CANCELED = 'N'
  AND DocDate BETWEEN TRY_CONVERT(date, @dateFrom) AND TRY_CONVERT(date, @dateTo);

-- Recordset #3: totalsToday
SELECT
  SUM(DocTotal) AS totalToday,
  COUNT(*) AS countToday
FROM OINV
WHERE
  SlpCode = @slpCode
  AND CANCELED = 'N'
  AND DocDate = @startOfToday;

-- Recordset #4: totalsMonth
SELECT
  SUM(DocTotal) AS totalMonth,
  COUNT(*) AS countMonth
FROM OINV
WHERE
  SlpCode = @slpCode
  AND CANCELED = 'N'
  AND DocDate >= @startOfMonth AND DocDate <= @startOfToday;",
  "params": {
    "slpCode": {slpCode},
    "dateFrom": "{dateFrom}",
    "dateTo": "{dateTo}"
  }
}

name: sapb1_sql_cartesset_lines (Journal lines + running balance for customer)
body_template:
{
  "dbName": "{dbName}",
  "db": {
    "server": "{server}",
    "database": "{dbName}",
    "user": "{user}",
    "password": "<REDACTED>"
  },
  "query": "DECLARE @fromDate DATE = TRY_CONVERT(date, NULLIF(@dateFrom,''));
DECLARE @toDate   DATE = TRY_CONVERT(date, NULLIF(@dateTo,''));

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    h.TransId,
    CAST(h.RefDate AS date) AS RefDate,
    h.BaseRef,
    h.Memo,
    l.Line_ID,
    l.ShortName AS CardCode,
    l.Account,
    CAST(l.Debit AS float) AS Debit,
    CAST(l.Credit AS float) AS Credit,
    CAST((l.Debit - l.Credit) AS float) AS Delta
  FROM OJDT h
  JOIN JDT1 l ON l.TransId = h.TransId
  WHERE
    l.ShortName = @cardCode
    AND (@fromDate IS NULL OR CAST(h.RefDate AS date) >= @fromDate)
    AND (@toDate   IS NULL OR CAST(h.RefDate AS date) <= @toDate)
)
SELECT
  *,
  SUM(Debit)  OVER() AS glbDebitTotal,
  SUM(Credit) OVER() AS glbCreditTotal,
  SUM(Delta)  OVER(ORDER BY RefDate, TransId, Line_ID ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS Balance
FROM base
ORDER BY RefDate, TransId, Line_ID;",
  "params": {
    "cardCode": "{cardCode}",
    "dateFrom": "{dateFrom}",
    "dateTo": "{dateTo}"
  }
}
